programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan, and they're doing all the renovation work themselves; he's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: An Atlanta couple fight budget restraints as they seek the perfect vacation home for their blended family in Jackson Lake, Ga.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state, and their agent finds a lakefront property that needs quite a few repairs.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: Empty nesters find a home on Lake of the Ozarks, Missouri, and leave snowy Indiana behind. He's a contractor and offers hands-on help during the renovation, but a major discovery during demolition disrupts the couple's plans.

programs.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work.

programs.title: Fixer Upper
programs.desc: Newlyweds want to find a home for three people with extra space available when their children come to visit.
